content.en:
"Registration is successful!"

Ye Tian only needs to wait quietly for the game to start.

Of course.

He also had to bet on himself so that he could earn a little more reincarnation coins.

However, his replica body is a reincarnation celestial, the odds must be very low, and he will definitely not earn any reincarnation celestial coins at the beginning, and most of his income will come from the prize money of the battle competition.

However, he can play the leapfrog fight, in which case, the odds are high.

And if you want to apply for the Skip Battle, you must complete a 10-game winning streak to be eligible to apply.

......

At this time.

The news that a reincarnation celestial clan was going to challenge the reincarnation heavenly pavilion spread, and the identity of Ao Chen was also dug up.

The most wasted reincarnation celestial clan, who has not yet awakened his bloodline in adulthood, is now just awakening his bloodline.

Therefore, many reincarnation celestial clans are naturally not optimistic about Aochen.

As a result, some reincarnation celestials instead bet on Aochen to lose, which increased Aochen's odds.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to play as Ao Chen.

There is a special Void Ring in the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, and the strength of different Void Rings is different, like the Void Ring of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of Awakening for a time, which is enough to support the battle of the Overlord of the Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm and will not shatter, it is enough to use.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian played, and his opponent was the Golden Armor Giant Snake Clan, which was also under the slave race of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and he was extremely tenacious.

At this time, the Golden Armor Giant Snake Clan's Origin Upper Realm Overlord was a little panicked, after all, the opponent was a reincarnation celestial clan, and if he didn't exert his strength, he might be killed.

After all, slave races like them, even if they were killed, the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion would not care, let alone rescue.

If he goes all out and kills a reincarnation celestial clan, he will also die, and even hurt the other party, and he will be in trouble in the future.

Of course.

If he played a fake match, it would definitely not be allowed, otherwise the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion would not let him go.

So, I can only go all out.

Rumble!!!!!

The golden armor giant snake made a move and attacked Ye Tian.

With Ye Tian's strength, it was naturally easy to kill this golden armored giant snake, and even as long as all his breath exploded, this golden armored giant snake would be scared half to death.

But.

He doesn't want to directly expose his strength, so how can he earn reincarnation coins?

Thereupon.

He only showed a very weak strength and fought against this golden-armored giant snake.

After a little effort, he slashed the Golden Armor Giant Serpent and won his first victory.

For this victory, the reincarnation celestial clan felt that it was normal, if the reincarnation celestial clan couldn't beat the golden armor giant snake clan, then it would be strange!

However, Ao Chen is a waste, and being able to defeat the Golden Armor Giant Serpent shows that it is not too waste.

As time passed, Ye Tian won one game after another as Ao Chen, and the opponents arranged for him naturally became stronger and stronger.

Finally, the tenth game belonging to Ye Tian began.

This time, Ye Tian's odds went up directly.

5 to 1!

That is to say, if you bet on Aochen, once you win, you can get five times the reincarnation coins.

The reason why there are such high odds is because Ye Tian is about to face a special slave race, the Tai Blood Lin Clan!

Although the Tai Blood Lin Clan is also a slave race, its status is much better than that of other slave races, second only to the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

Moreover, the best among the Tai Blood Lin Clan is an existence that the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan needs to pay attention to.

It's just because the Taixue Lin Clan has a weak reincarnation Heavenly Clan bloodline, and its own potential is also very high, and its comprehension and cultivation speed are very fast, so it is the first fighter of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan to the outside world.

And this time the one who fought against Ye Tian was the genius of the Taixue Lin Clan-Lin Yun!

Lin Yun is an Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but his combat power is terrifying, creating a lot of Upper Realm Techniques on the Other Side, and his flesh and blood body is extremely powerful, far surpassing other Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have awakened once.

Lin Yun had fought against a weaker Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and although he didn't win, he wasn't much weaker.

In the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion's Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Competition, Lin Yun has currently won a hundred consecutive victories, which can be said to be an almost invincible existence, and he has not participated in the competition for a long time.

This time, the reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor Aochen's ten-game winning streak allowed Lin Yun to make a move, which shows the importance that the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion attaches to Ye Tian.

Of course.

This is not suppression, how could the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion suppress the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, it is that they want to put a little pressure on Ao Chen, so that Ao Chen can break the bottleneck and be promoted to the second bloodline awakening.

But this is just their wrong calculation, Ye Tian is not here to sharpen the battle and break the bottleneck, he is purely here to earn reincarnation heavenly coins.

Now.

The main and deputy pavilion masters of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion were also paying attention to this game.

Xuduo said lightly: "Cha Bai, do you think Ao Chen has any hope of winning?"

Cha Bai shook his head, "Although Ao Chen is a member of our Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, his strength is not bad, but he is definitely not Lin Yun's opponent. Lin Yun's talent is very demonic, it's a pity that he is not a member of our reincarnation celestial clan, whether it is inheritance or resources, he has been suppressed by us, otherwise, with Lin Yun's talent potential, he would have broken through to the second awakening or even the third awakening. "

"If it's not my race, it's naturally impossible for them to grow up, otherwise that incident in the primeval era will be repeated!"

Before the game was about to start, Ye Tian bet all the reincarnation coins on his body to win.

It didn't take long for the game to begin.

On the Void Ring.

Lin Yun is arrogant, he is very valued by the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, and he is not afraid of offending an ordinary Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

"Kill!"

Lin Yun held a long sword in his hand, exuding an incomparably powerful Origin Ancestor on the other side, and a terrifying aura permeated him.

And Ye Tian also showed some strength a little, and he would not be weaker than Lin Yun.

Bang!!!!

The two sides continued to fight and fight, and the void ring was trembling.

This scene shocked the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion Pavilion Master Xuduo.

"Hey, this Aochen is so powerful, and he can fight with Lin Yun without being weak!"

They could clearly sense that the bloodline aura on Ao Chen's body was indeed a bloodline awakening, and if it was a second bloodline awakening, they would definitely not be able to hide it.

"Hahaha, our reincarnation celestial clan has given birth to another genius!"

It's not just the void, but many reincarnation celestials have this idea in their minds.

And the reincarnation celestial clan who had heard of Aochen before, couldn't believe it at the moment.

It's so strange that a waste material, who has no bloodline awakening in adulthood, only awakens once very late, and suddenly becomes a genius!

Of course.

There are also reincarnation celestial clans who think that Ao Chen is just a demon of the same level of combat power, and his cultivation speed is very slow, and if he can't break through to a better realm, it is useless.
